nasb.text: And He went away again beyond the Jordan to the place where John was first baptizing, and He was staying there.

esv.text: He went away again across the Jordan to the place where John had been baptizing at first, and there he remained.

cnv.text: 耶穌又往約旦河東去，到約翰從前施洗的地方，住在那裡。

ccb.text: 后来，耶稣到了约旦河东岸约翰从前施洗的地方，在那里住下来。

csbs.text: 耶稣又前往约旦河对岸，到约翰当初施洗的地方，住在那里。
